name: Hamiltonian Vector Fields
description: X_H: ι_{X_H}ω=dH. Hamiltonian flow preserves ω. Liouville: phase vol preserved.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: X_H\nι_{X_H}ω = dH"]
    D2["Def: Hamiltonian flow\nφ_t^H"]
    D3["Def: Symplectic map\nφ*ω = ω"]
    D4["Def: Poisson bracket\n{f,g} = ω(X_f,X_g)"]
    T1["Thm: φ_t*ω = ω\nflow preserves ω"]
    T2["Thm: Liouville\nvol preserved"]
    T3["Thm: d/dt f∘φ_t = {H,f}"]
    T4["Thm: Arnold–Liouville\nint sys action-angle"]
    T5["Thm: Noether\nsymm⇒conserved"]
    D1 --> D2
    D2 --> T1
    D3 --> T1
    D4 --> T3
    T1 --> T2
    T3 --> T5
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    class D1,D2,D3,D4 definition
    class T1,T2,T3,T4,T5 theorem
